arts.ttl: From almost quitting football to Ballon d'Or hope - Raphinha's rebirth
arts.sum: Guillem Balague takes a look at the rise of Raphinha and how he became the main man at Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Benfica: Champions League
arts.sum: Barcelona have a one goal advantage over Benfica going into the second leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie.

arts.ttl: Lage discusses Benfica’s chances against Barca in the UCL
arts.sum: Benfica manager Bruno Lage has shared his thoughts on Tuesday’s Champions League tie as he prepares to come up against Barcelona once more in the competition. Lage also praised Hansi Flick for the job he’s done since arriving in the summer but is still optimistic his team can get a result.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Mohamed Salah open to Barcelona move
arts.sum: - Manchester City have placed Real Madrid midfielder Eduardo Camavinga on their list of options for the summer transfer window and are actively monitoring him, according to Florian Plettenberg . Mohamed Salah's representatives have reportedly sounded out Barcelona over a potential move, while Eduardo Camavinga has been added to Manchester City's shortlist.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Benfica: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Barcelona vs Benfica in the Champions League round of 16, with TV & live stream details, team news, predicted lineups & score prediction.

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s planned rotations for Osasuna match revealed
arts.sum: According to local media, Wojciech Szczęsny, Jules Koundé, Pau Cubarsí, Lamine Yamal, Dani Olmo, and Raphinha were due to start after playing Benfica in the UEFA Champions League . Now that the match did not take place, Barcelona will repeat almost the exact XI as they played in the first leg against Benfica.

arts.ttl: One Barcelona will be suspended if shown a yellow card vs Atlético
arts.sum: A leading member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona will be forced to walk the disciplinary tightrope in the club’s next outing. The player in question? Iñigo…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star to start vs Benfica whilst fasting for Ramadan
arts.sum: A leading member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona will take to the pitch in the club’s next outing whilst in the thick of a fast. That’s…

arts.ttl: Details: Barcelona’s contract renewal offer for Frenkie de Jong
arts.sum: An insight into the details of the contract renewal offer put to midfield standout Frenkie de Jong by the brass at La Liga giants Barcelona has on Monday been provided.…

arts.ttl: Barcelona offered chance to sign South American goalscorer
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have been afforded the opportunity to sign one of the most highly-regarded up-and-coming talents in South America. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point towards Neiser…
